metadata.title: The Clocktower Riddle
metadata.author: AdventureKit Studio
metadata.summary: A moonlit puzzle adventure vertical slice about a town stopped at midnight and the hidden hour inside its clocktower.

storyBible.premise: A young bell apprentice returns to a town frozen at midnight and must align the tower's impossible bells before the hidden hour erases itself.
storyBible.targetPlayStyle: exploration, object collection, pattern puzzles, cinematic riddle reveals
storyBible.visualDirection: blue moonlight, brass mechanisms, wet cobblestones, candle-warm interiors, floating dust motes
pacingRules: Give every object a ritual purpose
worldRules: The tower responds to remembered names
The hidden hour cannot be owned
storyBible.coreMystery: The town did not lose an hour. Someone sealed it inside the clocktower to protect a dangerous memory.
storyBible.writingStyleGuide: Lyrical but playable. Short riddle lines, concrete objects, clear puzzle verbs.

characters.biography: Ilen left the tower as a child and returns with the only memory not frozen at midnight.
characters.secrets: Ilen's name is etched into the hidden hour gear.
characters.motivations: Wake the town without breaking the memory inside the tower.
characters.visualDescription: Short cloak, brass tool satchel, moonlit eyes, chalk on fingers.
characters.baseImagePrompt: Young bell apprentice in moonlit clocktower square, brass tools, cinematic fantasy mystery portrait, no text.

variants.description: Ilen raises the blue lantern when the hidden hour opens.
variants.imagePrompt: Bell apprentice raising blue lantern in a clocktower chamber, moonlit brass, cinematic fantasy.

characters.biography: Maes remembers the town through ledgers that keep rewriting themselves at midnight.
characters.secrets: Maes once helped hide the thirteenth-hour map.
characters.motivations: Make sure the town wakes with its history intact.
characters.visualDescription: Round spectacles, ink-black scarf, moonlit ledger under one arm.
characters.baseImagePrompt: Warm town archivist on clocktower balcony, ledger, blue moonlight and amber candles, fantasy portrait.
characters.voiceNotes: Soft, exact, often quotes old minutes.

variants.description: Maes points out a changed route in the tower map.
variants.imagePrompt: Archivist pointing to moonlit tower map, blue and candle lighting, fantasy mystery.

characters.biography: Vell rebuilt the tower gears and knows which one was made to lie.
characters.secrets: Vell removed the moon gear to stop the hidden hour from ringing.
characters.motivations: Repair the tower without reopening old blame.
characters.visualDescription: Sleeves rolled, brass filings on apron, pocket full of springs.
characters.baseImagePrompt: Clockmaker in brass gear library, moonlight through gears, cinematic fantasy portrait.
characters.relationshipNotes: Avoids Keeper Orrin and owes Maes a confession.

variants.description: Vell understands how the rings should align.
variants.imagePrompt: Clockmaker adjusting brass clockwork rings in blue moonlight, cinematic fantasy.

characters.biography: Sora tends the blue lanterns that only burn near true hours.
characters.secrets: Sora can hear the hour hidden behind the bell chamber wall.
characters.motivations: Help Ilen choose the hour instead of merely solving it.
characters.visualDescription: Lantern satchel, silver braid, moon-dust on sleeves.
characters.baseImagePrompt: Lantern keeper with blue glass lanterns in clocktower gallery, cinematic fantasy portrait.
characters.voiceNotes: Quick, bright, then very still when listening.

variants.imagePrompt: Lantern keeper holding glowing blue lantern, brass clocktower gallery, fantasy portrait.

characters.biography: Orrin sealed the hidden hour after the town used it to undo grief.
characters.secrets: Orrin remembers every failed restoration attempt.
characters.motivations: Prevent the tower from becoming a machine for denial.
characters.visualDescription: Tall coat, key ring, white hair, shadowed eyes.
characters.baseImagePrompt: Stern clocktower guardian in moonlit bell chamber, brass keys, cinematic fantasy portrait.
characters.voiceNotes: Low and formal, with old grief beneath.
characters.relationshipNotes: Tests whether Ilen understands restoration is not ownership.

variants.description: Orrin admits why the hidden hour was sealed.
variants.imagePrompt: Sad clocktower guardian holding brass keys under blue moonlight, cinematic fantasy.

items.name: Brass Winder
items.description: A palm-sized winding key with teeth worn smooth by many hands.

items.name: Ink-Spattered Map
items.description: A map showing the clocktower stairs and three marked bell chambers.

items.name: Blue Lantern
items.description: A lantern that glows only when the tower bells are near alignment.

items.name: Moon Gear
items.description: A small gear cut with thirteen teeth and a moon notch.

items.name: Bell Chalk
items.description: Silver chalk used to mark the true order of bell ropes.

gameplayHooks.title: Read the Stopped Square
gameplayHooks.narrativePurpose: Teach that the clock hands disagree with the shadows.
gameplayHooks.gameplayPurpose: Tap three environmental clues and form a riddle hypothesis.
gameplayHooks.expectedPlayerAction: Tap the tower face, fountain shadow, and dark windows.
gameplayHooks.uiLayoutNotes: Full background hotspot scan with three clue chips at bottom.
gameplayHooks.mobileGestureNotes: Single tap hotspots, large target zones.
gameplayHooks.agentPrompt: Design a mobile hotspot scan for a stopped magical town square.

gameplayHooks.title: Find the Brass Winder
gameplayHooks.narrativePurpose: Turn the dry fountain into the first physical clue.
gameplayHooks.gameplayPurpose: Search leaves, reveal hidden object, and log item.
gameplayHooks.expectedPlayerAction: Brush leaves aside and tap the brass glint.
gameplayHooks.uiLayoutNotes: Fountain art center with object drawer below.
gameplayHooks.agentPrompt: Create a fountain object-inspection hook for a brass winder clue.

gameplayHooks.title: Listen to the Bell Ropes
gameplayHooks.narrativePurpose: Teach that each rope carries a different hour.
gameplayHooks.gameplayPurpose: Identify the late, early, and lying bell tones.
gameplayHooks.expectedPlayerAction: Tap ropes in the heard order.
gameplayHooks.uiLayoutNotes: Three vertical rope lanes with pulse rings.
gameplayHooks.mobileGestureNotes: Tap ropes, no swipe precision required.
gameplayHooks.implementationNotes: Can become an audio-visual pattern module.
gameplayHooks.agentPrompt: Design a bell-rope listening hook with forgiving mobile taps.

gameplayHooks.title: Focus the Blue Lantern
gameplayHooks.narrativePurpose: Use lantern light to reveal the route into the bell chamber.
gameplayHooks.gameplayPurpose: Rotate lantern shutters until the hidden markings appear.
gameplayHooks.expectedPlayerAction: Tap shutter controls until the blue beam aligns.
gameplayHooks.successCondition: Beam catches the hidden stair mark.
gameplayHooks.failureCondition: Beam points away and wakes Orrin early.
gameplayHooks.uiLayoutNotes: Lantern object left, revealed mark right.
gameplayHooks.mobileGestureNotes: Use segmented rotate buttons instead of drag.
gameplayHooks.implementationNotes: Object orientation state with reveal threshold.
gameplayHooks.agentPrompt: Draft a blue-lantern object manipulation hook for mobile.

gameplayHooks.title: Align the Three Bells
gameplayHooks.narrativePurpose: Open the hidden hour by aligning the late, early, and lying bells.
gameplayHooks.gameplayPurpose: Place three bell tones into the correct hour slots.
gameplayHooks.expectedPlayerAction: Use the winder, map, and lantern cues to set the bell order.
gameplayHooks.successCondition: Bell order matches map and lantern glow.
gameplayHooks.failureCondition: Any bell lands on the false midnight mark.
gameplayHooks.uiLayoutNotes: Circular ring puzzle center with inventory hints along lower edge.
gameplayHooks.mobileGestureNotes: Stepper buttons for each ring, confirm button below.
gameplayHooks.agentPrompt: Design a clockwork bell alignment puzzle using winder, map, and lantern clues.

gameplayHooks.title: Assemble the Moon Gear
gameplayHooks.narrativePurpose: Reveal that Vell removed one gear to protect the town.
gameplayHooks.gameplayPurpose: Select the thirteen-tooth gear and place it in the repair frame.
gameplayHooks.expectedPlayerAction: Compare gear teeth and install the moon gear.
gameplayHooks.uiLayoutNotes: Gear shelf left, repair frame center, Vell notes right.
gameplayHooks.mobileGestureNotes: Tap gear, tap slot; no fine dragging.
gameplayHooks.agentPrompt: Design a gear-assembly hook for the clocktower workshop branch.

gameplayHooks.title: Rotate the Moon Dial
gameplayHooks.narrativePurpose: Convert the gear reveal into the final hidden-hour map.
gameplayHooks.gameplayPurpose: Rotate three moon slots until the hidden hour is readable.
gameplayHooks.expectedPlayerAction: Set new, full, and dark moon slots to the map marks.
gameplayHooks.failureCondition: Slots conflict with the bell order.
gameplayHooks.uiLayoutNotes: Three slot controls with big arrows and map preview.
gameplayHooks.mobileGestureNotes: Large plus/minus buttons, not free rotation.
gameplayHooks.implementationNotes: Stateful ring alignment with hint overlay.
gameplayHooks.agentPrompt: Draft a mobile moon-dial puzzle spec with three large controls.

gameplayHooks.title: Restore or Keep the Hour
gameplayHooks.narrativePurpose: Let the player decide whether the hidden hour belongs to the town.
gameplayHooks.gameplayPurpose: Choose an ending tone from restored, protected, or failed memory.
gameplayHooks.expectedPlayerAction: Choose to ring the hour or seal it gently.
gameplayHooks.failureCondition: Player chooses secrecy or runs out of time.
gameplayHooks.uiLayoutNotes: Two large ending cards over the hidden-hour art.
gameplayHooks.mobileGestureNotes: Tap large decision card; confirm second tap.
gameplayHooks.implementationNotes: Ending choice wrapper for premium build.
gameplayHooks.agentPrompt: Design a two-card hidden-hour ending choice with emotional copy.

scenes.title: Moonlit Square
scenes.purpose: Open on the stopped town and introduce the central riddle.
scenes.synopsis: Ilen returns to a town whose clocktower hands point to different hours.
scenes.camera: wide square, tower looming high, Ilen foreground
scenes.background: An empty old-town square waits under a clocktower whose hands point to different hours.
scenes.backgroundPrompt: Empty old-town square at midnight under towering clocktower, wet cobblestones, blue moonlight, brass clock face glowing, cinematic fantasy background, 16:9, no text.
scenes.soundMood: wind over stone, distant bell breath

layoutNotes.mobileLandscape: Wide tower art with dialogue bottom and clue chips right.

blocks.text: Every window in the square is dark except the clocktower face, which burns blue at midnight.

blocks.speaker: Ilen Var
blocks.text: The town stopped at twelve. The riddle says the tower starts again when someone remembers the missing hour.

scenes.title: Fountain Cache
scenes.purpose: Give the first object and map route.
scenes.synopsis: Ilen finds the brass winder and a route clue beneath dry leaves.
scenes.camera: close fountain basin, brass glint under leaves
scenes.background: A cracked fountain basin holds dry leaves and a hidden brass glint.
scenes.backgroundPrompt: Cracked dry fountain in moonlit town square, leaves, hidden brass glint, cinematic fantasy puzzle scene, 16:9, no text.

blocks.text: Under the leaves rests a brass winder, warm despite the cold square.

blocks.speaker: Ilen Var
blocks.text: A key without a lock means the lock is pretending to be something else.

scenes.title: Archivist Balcony
scenes.purpose: Explain the map and seed the hidden-hour ethics.
scenes.synopsis: Maes reveals the tower map keeps adding a thirteenth stair.
scenes.background: Candlelit ledgers flutter on a balcony overlooking the frozen town.
scenes.backgroundPrompt: Clocktower archivist balcony with ledgers, candlelight, blue moonlit square below, cinematic fantasy, 16:9, no text.

layoutNotes.mobileLandscape: Maes portrait right, map evidence center.

blocks.speaker: Maes Quill
blocks.text: The tower never had thirteen stairs to a landing. Tonight the map insists it did.
The ink mark sits where no corridor should be, bright as a new bruise.

choices.label: Ask why Orrin sealed the tower

scenes.title: Tower Stairs
scenes.purpose: Navigate the ascent and branch into lantern or bell routes.
scenes.synopsis: The stairwell counts upward while the shadows count down.
scenes.camera: vertical stairs, ropes descending through frame
scenes.background: A spiral stairwell rises past bell ropes descending like black threads.
scenes.backgroundPrompt: Ancient clocktower spiral stairwell, bell ropes descending, moon dust, brass shadows, cinematic fantasy background, 16:9, no text.

layoutNotes.mobileLandscape: Stair art left, route choices and hook right.

blocks.text: The steps count upward, but the tower shadows count down.

blocks.speaker: Ilen Var
blocks.text: Listen. One bell is late, one is early, and one is lying.

choices.label: Take the blue lantern from the hook

scenes.title: Lantern Gallery
scenes.purpose: Add Sora and the blue lantern manipulation hook.
scenes.synopsis: Sora shows Ilen how lantern light reveals honest hours.
scenes.background: A suspended walkway glows with blue lanterns, each one brightening near a true hour.
scenes.backgroundPrompt: Clocktower lantern gallery with rows of blue glass lanterns, brass walkway, moonlight, cinematic fantasy, 16:9, no text.

layoutNotes.mobileLandscape: Lantern object left, Sora portrait right.

blocks.speaker: Sora Lune
blocks.text: Point it at a lie and it goes dark. Point it at a true hour and it sings.

choices.label: Carry the focused lantern to the bells
Look for the missing gear first

scenes.title: Bell Chamber
scenes.synopsis: Three silent bells hang over a clockwork floor etched with moons and hour marks.
scenes.background: Three silent bells hang over a clockwork floor etched with moons and hour marks.
scenes.backgroundPrompt: Grand clocktower bell chamber, three silent bells, circular brass floor etched with moons and hour marks, cinematic puzzle background, 16:9, no text.

layoutNotes.mobileLandscape: Ring puzzle center with inventory hints bottom.
layoutNotes.mobilePortrait: Ring controls stacked under chamber art.

blocks.text: The brass winder fits into the floor, not the clock. The whole chamber waits to turn.

blocks.speaker: Keeper Orrin
blocks.text: If you wake what was hidden, wake it for the town. Not for yourself.

choices.label: Set the winder into the clockwork floor

scenes.title: Wrong Chime
scenes.purpose: Failure branch with retry and ending pressure.
scenes.synopsis: The tower rejects the attempt with a chime that races down the stairs.
scenes.background: The chamber rings once, far too loud, and dust falls like gray rain.
scenes.backgroundPrompt: Clocktower bell chamber shaking after wrong chime, dust falling, blue moonlight, cinematic fantasy, 16:9, no text.

layoutNotes.mobileLandscape: Failure text center with retry choices bottom.

blocks.text: The tower accepts the attempt, then rejects it with a chime that sends shadows racing downstairs.

blocks.speaker: Sora Lune
blocks.text: That was not midnight. That was the tower warning us.

choices.label: Use the map to reset the bells
Ask Orrin what the chime means

scenes.title: Hidden Hour
scenes.purpose: Reveal the core mystery and route to endings.
scenes.synopsis: A thirteenth hour opens behind the clock face.
scenes.camera: Ilen and lantern before suspended rain
scenes.background: A thirteenth hour opens behind the clock face, full of soft blue dust and suspended rain.
scenes.backgroundPrompt: Secret thirteenth hour chamber behind clock face, suspended rain, blue dust, brass stars, cinematic fantasy reveal, 16:9, no text.
scenes.soundMood: rain held in air, small bell tones

layoutNotes.mobileLandscape: Hidden chamber art full width with decision hook bottom.
layoutNotes.mobilePortrait: Reveal art above two ending cards.

blocks.speaker: Ilen Var
blocks.text: It was not a missing hour. It was a hidden one.
The tower begins to move, not forward, but honestly.

choices.label: Let the square hear the hidden hour
Close the chamber and keep the hour safe
Read the star map before choosing

scenes.title: Gear Library
scenes.purpose: Optional branch that enriches the object puzzle.
scenes.synopsis: Vell reveals the tower is missing a moon gear with thirteen teeth.
scenes.camera: Vell at repair bench, gear shelves behind
scenes.background: Shelves of brass gears surround a repair bench dusted with moonlight.
scenes.backgroundPrompt: Clocktower gear library, shelves of brass gears, repair ledgers, moonlight shafts, cinematic fantasy workshop, 16:9, no text.

layoutNotes.mobileLandscape: Gear shelf left, Vell dialogue and hook right.

blocks.speaker: Vell Brass
blocks.text: I took the thirteenth gear out because the town kept using the hour to unmake goodbyes.

scenes.title: Moon Dial
scenes.purpose: Turn the gear branch into a final clue.
scenes.synopsis: The moon gear unlocks a dial that shows the hidden hour's safe path.
scenes.camera: three moon slots viewed from above
scenes.background: A brass dial waits with three moon slots and one empty notch.
scenes.backgroundPrompt: Clocktower moon dial mechanism with thirteen slots, brass and blue moonlight, cinematic puzzle closeup, 16:9, no text.

layoutNotes.mobileLandscape: Three dial controls center, map preview right.

blocks.speaker: Vell Brass
blocks.text: Do not force it. The dial wants the moon as it was, as it is, and as it will be.

choices.label: Carry the moon gear to the bells

scenes.title: Keeper's Warning
scenes.purpose: Expose the moral stakes and recover from failed puzzles.
scenes.synopsis: Orrin warns that restoring the hour without care can trap the town in regret.
scenes.background: Keeper Orrin blocks the stair with keys that do not cast shadows.
scenes.backgroundPrompt: Stern clocktower guardian blocking blue-lit stair door, brass keys, moonlight, cinematic fantasy, 16:9, no text.

layoutNotes.mobileLandscape: Orrin center with two recovery choices bottom.

blocks.speaker: Keeper Orrin
blocks.text: The hidden hour gave everyone one more minute with what they had lost. Then no one could leave that minute.

scenes.title: Star Map
scenes.purpose: Late reveal branch that clarifies the best ending.
scenes.synopsis: A brass star map shows where the hidden hour should ring.
scenes.camera: star map unfolding over suspended rain
scenes.background: A brass star map unfolds over the hidden hour, each point a window in the town.
scenes.backgroundPrompt: Brass star map unfolding over blue hidden-hour chamber, suspended rain, cinematic fantasy, 16:9, no text.

layoutNotes.mobileLandscape: Star map center, ending choices below.

blocks.speaker: Maes Quill
blocks.text: It does not point to the tower. It points to every home that forgot how to begin again.
The map is not a route. It is permission.

choices.label: Ring the hour for the whole town
Seal the hour with its story intact

endings.title: The Tower Restored
endings.summary: The bells align and the town hears the hour it forgot, waking into motion under blue dawn.
endings.cinematicNotes: The clock hands meet, then separate into honest time as windows light one by one.

endings.title: The Secret Kept
endings.summary: The tower keeps its hidden hour, and only the lantern remembers how close the town came to waking.
endings.cinematicNotes: Ilen lowers the lantern as the chamber folds itself back behind the clock face.

endings.title: Square Unchanged
endings.summary: The tower settles back into silence, but the wrong chime leaves a new crack in the moonlit square.
endings.cinematicNotes: A single blue line crosses the dry fountain, promising another attempt.
